basics.name: Wazih Yeaser Tanzim
basics.label: AI Engineer @ Shottify · Research Assistant @ BUET | Wireless Communications × Machine Learning
basics.summary: Wireless-communications and machine-learning researcher working on deep-learning and model-based (deep-unrolled, physics-informed) methods for the physical layer — cell-free massive MIMO, hybrid and digital beamforming, and 6G-and-beyond systems. Currently preparing manuscripts on max-min-fair precoding for cell-free massive MIMO and seeking PhD opportunities.

work.name: Shottify
work.summary: Building an LLM-aided news-verification and misinformation-detection platform.
highlights: Built an LLM-aided news-verification platform with large-scale source collection, content normalization, vectorization, AI-driven sentiment analysis, and fake-news / misinformation detection to assess veracity, political bias, and credibility at scale.

work.name: Committee for Advanced Studies and Research (CASR), BUET
work.summary: Deep-learning and federated precoding for cell-free massive MIMO under max-min fairness.
highlights: Proposed deep-unrolled digital beamforming, DL-aided hybrid beamforming, and federated-learning frameworks for cell-free massive MIMO under max-min fairness objectives.
Leveraged DeepMIMO ray-traced data and a physics-inspired, channel-aware model-aggregation scheme.

work.name: BUET (supervised by Dr. Lutfa Akter)
work.summary: Beamforming algorithms and convex-optimization solvers for cell-free massive MIMO.
highlights: Implemented beamforming algorithms (alt-min, OMP, fully-digital) and convex-optimization solvers in MATLAB and Python.
Reproduced several benchmark cell-free massive MIMO papers and foundational wireless-communication concepts.

education.institution: Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET)
highlights: Undergraduate thesis: Deep-Learning-Aided Hybrid Beamforming Matrix Estimation for MU-MIMO Terahertz Communication Systems (Advisor: Prof. Md Forkan Uddin). Demonstrated spectral-efficiency gains and reduced complexity over conventional approaches; implemented in PyTorch.

publications.name: Deep-Unrolled Max-Min Precoding for Cell-Free Massive MIMO
publications.publisher: Manuscript in preparation (IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications)
publications.summary: An unsupervised deep-unrolling network that maps estimated CSI to max-min-fair precoders for cell-free massive MIMO, trained label-free on a worst-user spectral-efficiency objective.

publications.name: Deep Learning for Hybrid Beamforming in Multi-User Cell-Free MIMO
publications.summary: A deep-learning precoder that predicts hybrid (analog phase-shifter plus digital) beamformers directly from estimated CSI under the non-convex unit-modulus constraint.

publications.name: Federated Learning for Distributed Cell-Free MIMO across mmWave Sites
publications.summary: A federated-learning framework for privacy-preserving precoder training across multiple city-scale 28 GHz sites, with channel-aware model aggregation.

publications.name: Deep-Learning-Aided Hybrid Beamforming Matrix Estimation for MU-MIMO Terahertz Communication Systems (B.Sc. Thesis)
publications.publisher: Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET)
publications.summary: Hybrid beamforming matrix estimation via deep learning for a multi-user MIMO terahertz system; improved spectral efficiency and reduced computational complexity. Advisor: Prof. Md Forkan Uddin.

projects.name: ML-Based Power System Fault Detection, Classification & Location Estimation
projects.summary: ML pipeline on a Simulink-simulated dataset that detects/classifies the three primary power-system fault types and estimates fault locations.

projects.name: Automated Attendance via Speech & Voice Recognition
projects.summary: Jointly recognizes speech content and speaker identity for multi-task attendance automation.

projects.name: Gesture-Controlled Wheelchair
projects.summary: Translates hand-gesture accelerometer input into real-time motor control to aid limited-mobility users.

projects.name: FPGA-Based Automated Fan Control
projects.summary: FPGA controller toggling and speed-modulating a fan from human-presence and temperature sensing.

languages.fluency: IELTS Overall Band 7.5 (Listening 8.0, Reading 8.0, Writing 6.5, Speaking 6.0)

interests.name: Wireless Communication Systems
keywords: Fluid, movable, and pinching antenna systems
Deep learning for the physical layer

interests.name: Machine Learning & Signal Processing
keywords: Applications across wireless communications, image processing, and speech recognition
